name: llm-wiki-viz
description: Local Obsidian-style markdown viewer with backlinks and an interactive force-directed node graph.
author: Shanika Wijerathna

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
